description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle. In the course "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101), post a welcome announcement in the Announcements forum. Use the subject "Welcome to Introduction to Biology - Spring 2026" and the following message: "Dear students, Welcome to BIO101 Introduction to Biology. This semester we will cover fundamental concepts including cell biology, genetics, and ecology. Please review the course syllabus and complete the introductory survey by the end of the first week. Office hours are Tuesdays and Thursdays from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM in Room 301. Looking forward to a great semester! Best regards, Dr. Smith"

metadata.expected_subject: Welcome to Introduction to Biology - Spring 2026
